selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 3.4% and 20-day momentum is 4.9%.
Trend quality is supported by 40% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 3.6% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.1%, downside volatility near 1.3%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.2%.
Volume confirmation is -9.1% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 6.8% versus SPY over 5 days and -0.4% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.70, confidence 0.45, and 0.6 weighted articles across 3 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.86, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 3 sources, 0.6 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.94, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.82.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.069 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: Medtronic plc (MDT) Acquires SPR Therapeutics to Enhance Pain Intervention Prospects
news_evidence.llm_reason: Reports an acquisition of SPR Therapeutics. M&A announcements are company-specific and can move the stock near term, but impact depends on deal size, terms, and market reception; source appears to be an aggregator rather than primary release, so verification needed.

news_evidence.title: Can Medtronic Finally Challenge Intuitive Surgical's Robotic Surgical Systems Dominance?
news_evidence.llm_reason: Discussion of Medtronic's efforts to challenge Intuitive in robotic surgery. Useful for medium/long-term strategic view but unlikely to be a direct, immediate catalyst for MDT within the next 1–10 trading days absent a concrete product/regulatory announcement.
